title: Legacy4J Modern Panoramas
description: All the selections of Legacy Panoramas from 1.21.4 to present
body:
# Legacy4J Modern Panoramas

Legacy4J Modern Panoramas is a resource pack that changes the panorama to look like Modern Panoramas but still has the Legacy feel to it. This mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) needs to be added for this panorama to work!
